name: Strawberry Brownie Torte-Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line two 9-inch round cake pans with foil. Prepare the brownie mix according to package directions and pour into prepared pans. Bake for 20-30 minutes, until set but not fully baked.
2. Allow the brownie layers to cool completely, then carefully remove from pans. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1-2 hours to make handling easier.
3. Line one 9-inch round cake pan with foil. In a large bowl, combine the ice cream and chopped strawberries; spread into the prepared pan. Freeze until firm.
4. In a small saucepan, combine powdered sugar, chocolate chips, milk, and margarine. Heat over low heat until boiling, then reduce to a simmer for 8 minutes while stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Allow to cool slightly.
5. Assemble the torte by placing one brownie layer on a serving plate, followed by the ice cream layer, and the remaining brownie layer. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh strawberries. Cut into wedges; serve with chocolate topping. Makes 10 servings.
TIP: For easier cutting, allow the assembled dessert to stand at room temperature for about 10 minutes before serving.
